_note: Inputs are synthetic OpCode-3 Measurements frames exercising the configurable measurement bitmask (Mutelcor LoRaButton framing). expected.data values were produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (the source of truth) over each input and re-shaping to the normalized vocabulary: voltage->battery (V), signed16/10 deg C->air.temperature, 1-byte %->air.relativeHumidity, 16-bit ppb->air.tvoc, 16-bit /10 hPa->air.pressure, three 16-bit ug/m3->air.pm1_0/pm2_5/pm10. The codec never emits warnings, so none are declared. Vectors 1-2 satisfy the particulate atLeastOne (PM/TVOC); vectors 1 and 3 satisfy the climate requires (temperature + relativeHumidity).

uplink.description: OpCode 3 Measurements: temperature + relative humidity + TVOC + particulate matter (satisfies both particulate and climate)
OpCode 3 Measurements: negative temperature + relative humidity + particulate matter (two's-complement temp, particulate)
OpCode 3 Measurements: temperature + relative humidity + pressure (climate requires, no particulate)
OpCode 3 but no measurement bitmask byte
Particulate matter declared in extended bitmask but truncated
